initial_location_description: A vibrant manhwa-style classroom with large windows letting in golden afternoon light. Desks are arranged in neat rows, and a chalkboard in the front is covered in complex literature notes. The atmosphere is thick with the post-lunch lethargy of high school students.
initial_bgm: upbeat academic tension with light woodwinds

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Do you have any idea how much work this project actually entails, Ji-ho? It's not just 'googling a few facts' and calling it a day.
main_dialogue.tone: Determined and lecture-like; the voice of a student council president reaching her limit.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pouting, arms crossed over her book, looking away with a slightly annoyed expression.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Relax, Seo-yoon. You worry enough for the both of us. It’s a presentation, not a thesis for the Ministry of Education.
main_dialogue.tone: Teasing and breezy, completely unfazed by her intensity.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Teasing posture, winking with a cheeky grin, tongue slightly peeking out.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: Oh, is that so? Then maybe you should see the 'light reading' I've prepared for our first draft!
main_dialogue.tone: Challenging; she's about to make a point and she knows she's right.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined gaze, holding the book firmly in both hands as if preparing for a challenge.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: With a flourish that could only be described as 'theatrical overachiever,' Seo-yoon begins hauling massive, leather-bound research volumes out of her bag. One, two... five... eight... they pile up into a precarious tower on the edge of the shared desk.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Whoa! Are you trying to build a fortress or a bibliography? Wait, I think I just got a text...
main_dialogue.tone: Stunned and slightly mocking, but quickly distracted.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Startled expression, eyes wide, mouth slightly open, jacket slipping off his shoulder.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Ji-ho shifts his weight to reach into his pocket. His oversized varsity jacket—loose and unzipped—flares out like a cape.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands thrown up slightly in shock, about to drop her book, jaw slightly open.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: It happens in slow motion. The corner of his sleeve catches the spine of the topmost book. The entire 'Research Mountain' tilts, wavers, and then succumbs to gravity.

main_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
main_dialogue.text: What in the world is that racket?!
main_dialogue.tone: Startled and authoritative, breaking the sudden silence of the class.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shocked expression, eyes wide behind glasses, grip loosening on the wooden pointer.

main_dialogue.speaker: Lee Hana
main_dialogue.text: Omo! Seo-yoon, are you okay? It looks like a library exploded over there!
main_dialogue.tone: Shocked and slightly amused, looking over from her desk.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Deeply surprised, both hands on her cheeks, mouth in an 'O' shape.

main_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
main_dialogue.text: KANG JI-HO! You literal walking disaster area! Do you have any coordination at all?!
main_dialogue.tone: Explosive and furious; her face is turning as red as a beet.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pointing forward with a serious expression, glasses reflecting a slight glint.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
main_dialogue.text: Me?! You're the one who brought an entire wing of the national library to school! It's a safety hazard!
main_dialogue.tone: Defensive and loud, matching her energy to hide his embarrassment.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Aggressive stance, gritting teeth, sharp glare, fists clenched at his sides.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: Safety hazard? My research is the only thing keeping this team's grades alive, you... you varsity-jacketed menace!
branching_dialogue.tone: Escalating frustration, her hands are shaking with anger.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Waving one hand dismissively in a panic, blushing heavily, eyes looking flustered.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Mr. Han
branching_dialogue.text: That is enough! Both of you, pick up those books and see me after class. My ears are ringing!
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sighing with eyes closed, hand rubbing the bridge of his nose, looking tired and overworked.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Min Seo-yoon
branching_dialogue.text: [Deep breath] I... I can't even deal with you right now. Just... just help me pick them up before Mr. Han gives us a demerit.
branching_dialogue.tone: Controlled but icy, trying to regain her composure.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands clasped together over her book, bowing her head slightly in an apologetic pose.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kang Ji-ho
branching_dialogue.text: Fine. My bad, okay? I'll grab the heavy ones. You don't have to look like you're about to cry.
branching_dialogue.tone: Softening slightly, looking away to hide his guilt.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hand behind head rubbing neck, looking away with a slight blush, genuine embarrassed smile.
